summary: Most implementation-ready: .patch + full files + snapshot + SQL verification + validation is a preserved project packet for this is the most implementation-ready package in the bundle — not a spec, not a design brief, but an actual merge-ready patch bundle with both diff-format patches (diffs/) and full file contents (patch/), plus snapshot reference files to diff against, plus SQL verification queries, plus rustfmt/tsc validation outputs.
final_use_case: It preserves the distinctive design logic for Most implementation-ready: .patch + full files + snapshot + SQL verification + validation, so the portfolio can show the actual mechanism and status instead of reducing the project to a file-count or handoff label.
